case_title: JESUS GARCIA LOPEZ ET AL VS. UNITED TRANSPORTATION MOVING & STORAGE

docket_entries.description: REMARK:RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE SEP-11-2023 DISMISSAL MAIL TO DEFENDANT(ENVOLOPE MARKED:RETURN TO SENDER NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED UNABLE TO FORWARD)
ORDER TO DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE: NO APPEARANCES

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-10-2023 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION DUE TO THE CONDITION OF THE COURT CALENDAR TO APR-14-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFFS HAVE BEEN INFORMED BY PHONE OF THE CONTINUANCE DATE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PLAINTIFF IS ADVISE BY COURTROOM CLERK TO RE-RESERVE CLAIM TO THE DEFENDANT WITH THE NEW COURT DATE. PROOF OF SERVICE IS REQUIRED TO BE FILED AT LEAST 5 DAYS PRIOR THE COURT DATE. CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,880.00 FILED BY GARCIA LOPEZ, JESUS LILLO OSUNA, MARIA ANGELES AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED TRANSPORTATION MOVING & STORAGE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-10-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-14-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-28-2023 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFFS JESUS GARCIA LOPEZ AND MARIA ANGELES LILLO OSUNA ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT UNITED TRANSPORTATION MOVING & STORAGE IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARGARET WU; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-28-2023 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION DUE TO THE CONDITION OF THE COURT CALENDAR TO SEP-01-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFFS NOTIFIED BY PHONE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
